title: Linux SSH Authorized Keys Modified
description: Detects modifications to SSH authorized_keys files, which may indicate backdoor access being established.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ((msg like '*authorized_keys*'))
